PowerShell($root = "c:\\wamp64\\www\\an electron overlay to show  your different desktops  as a grid"; $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo; $psi.FileName = "powershell.exe"; $psi.Arguments = "-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$root\\host.ps1`""; $psi.UseShellExecute = $false; $psi.RedirectStandardInput = $true; $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true; $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true; $psi.CreateNoWindow = $true; $p = [System.Diagnostics.Process]::Start\($psi\); Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $p.StandardInput.WriteLine\("LIST"\); $p.StandardInput.Flush\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $lines = @\(\); while \($p.StandardOutput.Peek\(\) -ge 0\) { $lines += $p.StandardOutput.ReadLine\(\) }; $p.StandardInput.WriteLine\("EXIT"\); $p.WaitForExit\(5000\) | Out-Null; $lines -join "`n"; "---ERR---"; $p.StandardError.ReadToEnd\(\))
